classification_reasoning: The thread started with the professor’s prompt and quickly generated substantive, evidence‑based posts from five different students. Each contribution built on the previous one—identifying data bias, discussing proxy variables, linking evaluation metrics, and raising fairness frameworks—showing clear integration of ideas. However, the last post was on 2026-03-12 and no new activity has occurred for more than 48 hours (current date 2026-04-25), so the discussion is stalled. Engagement peaked early then dropped off, indicating a declining trajectory. Participation is distributed across five learners with student-to-student exchanges, and the discourse is substantive rather than formulaic. The thread is in the integration phase of the inquiry model, as participants are connecting concepts but have not yet reached a concluding synthesis.
